title: AhhPvP
description: Fireballs, TNTs, Self-res Platform, Bridge Egg, Strong Glass and Short/Long Invisibility Potion and much more!
body:
[[Curseforge Download Link]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ahh-pvp)

## Introduction
A Mod helping PvP. Items: 
- Water Bottle + Glass(Brewing recipe): Invisibility Potion 30s
- Throwable Fireball(createFire, breakBlocks)
- Rescue Platform(CD 20s, blocks placed by it don't drop)
- Auto TNT Ignite(That's the custom one)
- 1.8 Fishing Rod
- Bridge Egg
- 1.8 Sword
- Bed Bug
- So on...

## Technical
```
MOD_ID: pvp
package: com.aiden.pvp
```
